governing_logic: Soreheim Proper remains the hardest central sink because alliance rule, foreign affairs, war industry, and quota law are tower-governed there, while Eternal and Unternal domestic life is mediated downward through regional leaders, industrial clans, and patron-families.

role_bands.function: Makes giant supremacy operable through orders, quota scheduling, interregional communications, tribute-to-contribution conversion, and central arbitration between Eternal Lands, Unternal Lands, and Soreheim Proper.

Turns contribution-based justice into daily procedure: loss assessment, restitution matching, labor sentence placement, favor-debt registration, work-gang supervision, compliance review, and settlement-level family arbitration beneath central law.

Makes industrial clans governable at scale through extraction scheduling, forge intake control, machine maintenance chains, ore tallies, hazard watch, transfer discipline, and the family patronage blocs that hold crews together across quarry, depot, span, tower, and bridge nodes.

Keeps communal ownership from collapsing into scarcity by organizing field quotas, water usage, drought response, granary audits, animal labor rotation, seed custody, harvest-to-city transfer, and family-brokered local compliance in the Unternal Lands.

anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Central command sink where the Giant Council, quota ledgers, tribunal review, and refined distribution all converge.
Layered tower bureaucracy that converts raw extraction into governed production and ceremonial authority.
A mountain-breaking industrial front where heavy machinery, hazard law, and labor coordination remain inseparable.
Fortified extraction settlement where ore discipline, predator defense, and partial refinement meet.
Artisanal and transfer town converting agricultural surplus into tools, textiles, and allocable goods.
Cultural and exchange hub for field output, festivals, and quota-visible redistribution.
Geothermal worker settlement focused on heated shelter, labor recovery, and shift rotation.
Desert-edge fortified node defending extractive and agricultural lanes against southern predation and scarcity.
Beacon tower chain responsible for alarm transmission, route visibility, and night hazard posture.
High-output communal grain belt whose administration matters as much as its soil.
Major throughput choke point where bridge law, priority passage, and production conflicts become visible.
Central receiving and redistribution node for ore, tools, machine parts, and work orders.
Ambition-focused ceremonial office that binds labor achievement to moral legitimacy.
Communal solidarity site reinforcing food, care, and duty obligations.
Reflective planning site where long-horizon decisions and elite review are ritualized.

anchor_allocations.anchor_kind: cold-weather repair yard and storage complex
anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Valid because Soreheim already depends on storm-exposed industrial maintenance in the Eternal Lands; this is a downward maintenance layer, not new polity identity.
Valid because the Unternal Lands already sustain large communal agriculture; this merely names the bureaucracy needed to manage it.
Valid because quarry output and watchtower logic imply illuminated transport infrastructure between extraction and depot nodes.

anchor_allocations.anchor_kind: message, seal, and schedule transfer station
anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Valid because Titan Towers and interregional command imply relay offices rather than purely physical grandeur.

anchor_allocations.anchor_kind: grain drying, reserve storage, and ration buffering basin
anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Valid because Soreheim agriculture and communal ownership require buffer infrastructure against drought, spoilage, and quota shock.

anchor_allocations.anchor_kind: inspection gate for labor vows, work assignment, and cargo seals
anchor_allocations.functional_profile: Valid because reparative labor and favor-based restitution require entry-control offices to bind sentence, cargo, and movement together.
